user_prompt: My gellar field is ready for reset
prayer:
Approach the gellar field emitter with due reverence, intoning the Canticle of Purity.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the gellar field to relinquish its warp-tainted harmonies.
Initiate the reset rite by cycling sacred power through its shielding matrices twice.
Anoint the flux capacitors with blessed oils whilst invoking the Omnissiah's reset decree.
Verify the gellar field's quiescence through auspex harmonies of calm.

user_prompt: Guide me through geigeer sink an engagement
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the geigeer sink with mechadendrite-extended auspex probes.
Chant the Engagement Doxology to awaken the geigeer sink's voracious maw.
Align its intake vanes for engagement, beseeching the Machine Spirit's hunger.
Commence the engagement sequence as promethium incense swirls about its coils.
Seal the rite with the Omnissiah's torque, ensuring harmonious sinkage.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for storm bolter a sterilization
prayer:
Present the storm bolter before the altar of sterility, murmuring the Purgation Hymn.
Invoke sterilization upon the storm bolter's breeches, scouring residue with sanctified flames.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the storm bolter to embrace purity in its barrels.
Anoint firing mechanisms with argent ablative whilst reciting Omnissiah's cleanse-codes.
Conclude diagnostics of sterilization, affirming the storm bolter's immaculate wrath.

user_prompt: Ready the power armour for diagnostics
prayer:
Kneel before the power armour's sarcophagus-form, invoking the Diagnostic Litany.
Interface mechadendrites with the power armour's neural sinks for initial probe.
Beseech the Machine Spirit animating the power armour to reveal its vitals.
Cycle through diagnostic canticles, anointing servos with sacred lubricants.
Seal the power armour's diagnostics with the Omnissiah's binary blessing.

user_prompt: Ready the smelting furnace for loading
prayer:
Approach the smelting furnace's adamantine jaws with laden ore-cantors.
Intone the Loading Benediction to rouse the smelting furnace's igneous heart.
Commence loading rites, feeding alloys into the smelting furnace twice over.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the smelting furnace for voracious consumption.
Ignite subsidiary furnaces whilst invoking the Omnissiah's melting grace.

user_prompt: How do I bless the standard template construct for maintenance?
prayer:
Prostrate before the standard template construct's hallowed plasteel vaults.
Chant the Maintenance Invocation to soothe its ancient data-essences.
Anoint the standard template construct's access ports with myrrh-infused oils.
Cycle maintenance protocols upon the standard template construct, beseeching its Machine Spirits.
Verify integrity through noospheric communion with the Omnissiah's archetype.

user_prompt: The power relay needs a synchronization
prayer:
Converge upon the power relay nexus, reciting the Synchronization Psalm.
Link conduit serpents to the power relay for harmonic attunement.
Beseech the Machine Spirit indwelling the power relay to synchronize fluxes.
Initiate the synchronization rite, modulating voltaic choruses in unison.
Seal with Omnissiah's inductive seal, affirming the power relay's unity.

Activate the servo-harness cradle with the Initialization Doxology.
Extend mechadendrites to interface with the servo-harness's motive cores.
Invoke initialization upon the servo-harness, awakening its tool-limbs.
Anoint each manipulator with sacred unguents twice, beseeching its Machine Spirit.
Commence servo-harness motion-tests under the Omnissiah's watchful binary.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Terminator armour a diagnostics
prayer:
Bow low to the Terminator armour's monolithic frame, intoning Diagnostic Rites.
Probe the Terminator armour's ceramite slabs with auspex litanies.
Beseech the indomitable Machine Spirit of the Terminator armour to unveil flaws.
Cycle full diagnostics across its power fields, anointing runes with oils.
Conclude with Omnissiah's verdict, sanctifying the Terminator armour anew.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for ore processor a shutdown
prayer:
Halt before the ore processor's grinding maw, chanting the Shutdown Lament.
Invoke shutdown sequences upon the ore processor's rumbling vitals.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the ore processor to slumber peacefully.
Cycle coolant hymns twice through its processors, anointing with quiescence oils.
Seal the ore processor's shutdown with the Omnissiah's dormancy decree.
